entries.source: Turn diagrams, body systems, maps, workflows, or lab setups into label practice with hints and answer checks.
entries.value: U beddel jaantusyada, nidaamyada jirka, khariidadaha, socodka shaqada, ama habaynta shaybaadhka layliyo calaamadayn ah oo leh tilmaamo iyo hubinta jawaabaha.

entries.source: What diagram should we practice labeling?
entries.value: Jaantuskee ayaan ku celcelinaa calaamadayntiisa?
Barashada Firfircoon

entries.source: Turn diagrams, body systems, maps, workflows, or lab setups into label practice with hints and answer checks.
entries.value: U beddel jaantusyada, nidaamyada jirka, khariidadaha, socodka shaqada, ama habaynta shaybaadhka layliyo calaamadayn ah oo leh tilmaamo iyo hubinta jawaabaha.

entries.source: Learners exploring active learning topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Ardayda sahaminaya mawduucyada waxbarashada firfircoon ee doonaya hagitaan wax ku ool ah halkii ay ka heli lahaayeen sanduuq jawaab guud.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for diagram labeling practice with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Habkan waxaa loo habeeyay ku celcelinta calaamadaynta jaantuska oo leh dhiirigelin u gaar ah, tusaalooyin, iyo habka waxbarashada.

entries.source: Practice labels for diagrams and systems
entries.value: Ku celceli calaamadaha jaantusyada iyo nidaamyada
Ku bilow dhiirigelin tusaale ah

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal
entries.value: La qabso kalfadhiga yoolkaaga
Calaamadee unugga dhirta
Ku celceli jaantuska wadnaha
Samee su'aalo calaamadaynta khariidadda
Soo-saaraha Ciyaarta Isbarbardhigga

entries.source: Pair terms, definitions, causes, and examples
entries.value: Isku lammaan ereyada, qeexitaannada, sababaha, iyo tusaalooyinka

entries.source: Turn notes into matching games for vocabulary, concepts, people/events, formulas, examples, or cause-effect pairs.
entries.value: U beddel qoraallada ciyaaraha isbarbardhigga ee ereyada, fikradaha, dadka/dhacdooyinka, qaaciidooyinka, tusaalooyinka, ama lammaanaha sabab-iyo-saameyn.

entries.source: What pairs should become a matching game?
entries.value: Waa maxay lammaanaha ay tahay inay noqdaan ciyaar isbarbardhig?
Waxbarashada Firfircoon

entries.source: Turn notes into matching games for vocabulary, concepts, people/events, formulas, examples, or cause-effect pairs.
entries.value: U beddel qoraallada ciyaaraha isbarbardhigga ee ereyada, fikradaha, dadka/dhacdooyinka, qaaciidooyinka, tusaalooyinka, ama lammaanaha sabab-iyo-saameyn.

entries.source: Learners exploring active learning topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Ardayda sahaminaya mawduucyada waxbarashada firfircoon ee doonaya hagitaan wax ku ool ah halkii ay ka heli lahaayeen sanduuq jawaab guud.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for matching game generator with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Habkan waxaa loo habeeyay soo-saaraha ciyaarta isbarbardhigga oo leh dhiirigelin u gaar ah, tusaalooyin, iyo habka waxbarashada.

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal
entries.value: La qabso kalfadhiga yoolkaaga
Isku lammaan ereyada iyo qeexitaannada
Abuur lammaanaha sabab-iyo-saameyn
Samee ku celcelinta isbarbardhigga qaaciidada
XP & Heerarka

entries.source: Turn progress into levels and quests
entries.value: U beddel horumarka heerar iyo hawlgallo

entries.source: Design a points, levels, quests, and rewards system around real learning progress.
entries.value: Naqshadee nidaam dhibco, heerar, hawlgal, iyo abaalmarinno ku salaysan horumarka dhabta ah ee waxbarashada.

entries.source: What learning goal should become a leveling system?
entries.value: Yoolkee waxbarasho ayay tahay inuu noqdo nidaam heer-sare ah?
Ciyaareynta (Gamification)

entries.source: Design a points, levels, quests, and rewards system around real learning progress.
entries.value: Naqshadee nidaam dhibco, heerar, hawlgal, iyo abaalmarinno ku salaysan horumarka dhabta ah ee waxbarashada.

entries.source: Learners exploring gamification topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Ardayda sahaminaya mowduucyada ciyaareynta ee raba hage wax ku ool ah halkii ay ka heli lahaayeen sanduuq jawaab guud.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for xp & leveling with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Habkan waxaa loo habeeyay XP iyo heerarka iyadoo leh dhiirigelin, tusaalooyin, iyo habsocod waxbarasho oo u gaar ah.

entries.source: Turn progress into levels and quests
entries.value: U beddel horumarka heerar iyo hawlgallo
Ku bilow tusaalooyin dhiirigelin ah

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal
entries.value: La qabso kalfadhiga yoolkaaga
Samee XP loogu talagalay diyaarinta imtixaanka
Naqshadee heerar loogu talagalay ku-dhaqanka koodhka
U beddel akhriska hawlgallo
Calaamadaha & Guulaha
Abaalmari marxaladaha muhiimka ah ee qiimaha leh

entries.source: Create badges for consistency, mastery, courage, revision, collaboration, and finished artifacts.
entries.value: Abuur calaamado loogu talagalay joogtaynta, xirfad-sarraynta, geesinimada, dib-u-eegista, wada-shaqeynta, iyo waxyaabaha la dhammaystiray.
